description: Projects that define agents in non-standard formats (e.g., Markdown instead of persona YAML) tend to have the most ungoverned capabilities. Format divergence is a leading indicator of governance divergence — when a repo invents its own agent definition format, it signals that governance integration was never deep enough to constrain agent creation patterns.
source_patterns: belief:2026-03-17-ga-governance-integration — ga has 9 agents in .agent/ defined as Markdown with no Demerzel persona mapping
belief:2026-03-17-ga-governance-integration — ga truth_value is F despite having a submodule registered
belief:2026-03-17-consumer-repo-integration-status — directives not yet transmitted via Galactic Protocol
belief:2026-03-17-ix-governance-integration — ix has scaffolding but stale content, suggesting surface-level adoption
